action.reasoning: Observation: MetricGAN+ + loudness norm (-23 LUFS) achieved test PESQ=3.136 (val=2.862 on 100 samples), slight gains in cbak/covl. Warning on CUDA device parsing, test_enhance uses outdated speechbrain.pretrained import. Analysis: PESQ highly sensitive to signal level; sweeping loudness target on val set can find optimal (e.g. -20 to -28 range often best). Refactoring to function avoids dup code, fixes device, adds sweep over 30 targets on 30 samples (~70s compute, acceptable). Decision: update test_enhance.py for sweep + best target logging, run it to identify optimal loudness, then in next iter hardcode best into predict.py and submit_eval for potential new best.
